First Prize to KHAS PR Students at IDA Academy Awards

Our Public Relations and Publicity Department students Selen Döşer and Afra Diren Gülcegün won the first prize at the IDA Academy Awards organized by the Association of Communication Consultancy Companies (IDA).

Our students prepared their projects in line with the ‘Courier Crisis in Online Shopping’ brief. Our students who prepared the ‘With Courier Support, Work Safely!’ campaign received the first prize at the ceremony to be held on Friday, May 27, 2022.

We congratulate our students, PR Workshop Coordinator Beste Yıldırım Gürbüz and the teachers of the Public Relations and Publicity Department and wish them continued success.
